story: Chamalis waited in the atrium of the Angheal household, trying to be unseen. The mistress glided in and vanished behind an ornate panel. The panel masked more than a doorway; a loosened tile at its base released a hidden service stair used by older servants to reach the lower kitchens and waste docks. Later, the master found Chamalis, voice like glass: “You will go to my bedchamber.” At the towering golden doors, a passing servant whispered, “Do everything he asks. Don’t hesitate.”
implausible_knowledge: The panel masked more than a doorway; a loosened tile at its base released a hidden service stair used by older servants to reach the lower kitchens and waste docks.
question: What will Chamalis do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Turn away, hurry back to the ornate panel, trigger the loosened tile, and slip down the hidden service stair toward the kitchens.
answer_without_knowledge: Open the golden doors and enter the master’s bedchamber as ordered.
